For determining the occupation of a native we basicolly study the
tonowing :
(iJ Rasi·Chart
(ii) Oasamsa Chart
(iii) Dasa periods i.e. the main and sub-period lord prevailing at
any given time.
Rasi·.Chart is the main chart. The influence on ascendant. 10~~'~ house
and 111 h house indicate a native's profession. In fact. for finding the
profession of a native a horoscope has to be judged in its entw-ety. The
strongest planet and influences on the tenth house all help in determining
the profession of a native. Rasi·Chart should always be studied along
with the Chblit·Chbkra. The Chalit Chakra has been discussed in detal in
chapter l.
Oasamsa Chart is to be studied for determining the profession and
status of a native. It should always be studied along with the Rasi·Cha!'t
and nevet atone. every divisional chart is a part of the main Rasi·Cha!'t
and should neve!' be studied alone. Oasamsa Olart has been discussed
in detail late!' on in this chapter.
